name: aws___retrieve_skill
description:
Retrieve an AWS skill (workflows, references). Returns SKILL.md, or `file` if given.

Call `search_documentation` FIRST and copy `skill_name` verbatim -- it is an opaque registry ID. Never guess or fabricate `skill_name` or `file`.

file.description: Optional file path within the skill, copied as cited (e.g. `references/architecture.md`). Don't add or strip a `references/` prefix. Omit for SKILL.md.

skill_name.description: Required. Exact `skill_name` from a search_documentation result, copied verbatim. Do not invent or modify.
